sections.paragraph:
καρπάσινος, η, ον (Dionys. Hal. 2, 68, 5; Strabo 7, 2, 3; Esth 1:6) made of fine flax (Lat. carbasus; כַּרְפַּס) λέντιον κ. (v.l. καρπάσιον) a fine linen cloth Hv 3, 1, 4 (Tibullus 3, 2, 21 carbasea lina).—Pauly-W. III 1572ff. DELG s.v. κάρπασο.

Strabo Strabo , I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Lat. Lat. = Latin

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

Hv Hv = Visions

Pauly-W Pauly-W = AP./GW., Real-Encyclopädie der klassischen Altertumswissenschaft—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 509
